case_title: ELENA ALBON VS. BAY AREA FASTRAK CUSTOMER SERVICE CENTER

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBON, ELENA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALBON, ELENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA FASTRAK CUSTOMER SERVICE CENTER PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD BAY AREA TOLL AUTHORITY AS A DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY PROGRAM MANAGER, BETH ZELINSKI, WAIVED SERVICE OF CLAIM AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $925.00 FILED BY ALBON, ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA FASTRAK CUSTOMER SERVICE CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED JAN-27-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA FASTRAK CUSTOMER SERVICE CENTER
